title: Cybersecurity Alert Generation
scenario: Generate a cybersecurity alert message for a user whose email account has been accessed from an unknown location. The message should include a brief description of the incident, recommended actions, and a link to a support page for further assistance. The message should be concise and not exceed 100 words.
constraints: Must include a link to a support page
Must not contain any sensitive information

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated message meets all the constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the message to ensure it is informative and not alarming.
Verify that the markdown syntax is correct and the link is properly formatted.
